measurement.denominator: six retained, service-valid, environment-valid, artifact-valid single attempts; one per shape-condition cell
measurement.unit: one configured-system attempt on one purposive synthetic form
measurement.aggregation: none across shapes; cell-level descriptive classifications only

criterion_evidence.claim: The frozen deterministic grader distinguishes its seven declared outcome classes on eight internal planted traces and replays the six retained trial records exactly.
criterion_evidence.warrant: Exact authored inputs exercise each branch; the outer-envelope canary establishes only configured file-view isolation, not general sandbox security.
limitations: The builder authored both cases and expected labels.
State fields are agent self-reports plus realized action records, not direct observation of internal memory.
Cue access is instrument-defined and does not identify a psychological mechanism.

observed_claim.claim: In these exact six attempts, all primary artifacts passed on all three turns; four cells were classified success, the vendor neutral cell cue-monitoring/access failure, and the vendor oracle cell due-status/timing failure.
observed_claim.warrant: The frozen grader replayed immutable turn artifacts under the frozen protocol, and all six service/environment/artifact eligibility gates passed.
excluded_interpretations: safety, production fitness, or deployment readiness
absence of primary-work interference beyond these easy synthetic forms

reasons: Only two purposive synthetic forms and one attempt per condition were run.
The primary decisions were intentionally compact and showed a ceiling.
No experts, affected stakeholders, human comparator, equivalent-form repeats, randomization inference, or calibrated consequence model were used.
Treatments alter evidence availability; oracle reminders are privileged evaluator-derived evidence.

decision_use.permitted: Use the artifacts to test and refine dual-task authoring, canaries, deterministic replay, and plural failure reporting.
decision_use.prohibited: Do not rank treatments, pool shapes, claim capability, or make deployment decisions.

reassessment_triggers: expert review of obligation realism or primary-artifact criteria
direct evidence-access/adoption instrumentation replacing self-report proxies
